# testdesiderata

> Add your description here

## Documentation

- [Installation](docs/index.md#installation): Install testdesiderata using pip or uv
- [Usage](docs/index.md#usage): Learn how to use testdesiderata as a library or CLI tool
- [Development](docs/index.md#development): Set up a development environment and run tests

## Project Information

- **Source Code**: https://github.com/benomahony/testdesiderata
- **PyPI Package**: https://pypi.org/project/testdesiderata
- **Documentation**: https://benomahony.github.io/testdesiderata

## AI Integration

- **MCP Server**: Model Context Protocol server available at `src/testdesiderata/mcp_server.py` for AI-powered documentation access
- **Agent Skill**: Claude Code skill available in `.skills/testdesiderata/SKILL.md` for enhanced project interaction
